personal_info.title: Web Developer
personal_info.address: 154 Doi Can, Ba Dinh, Ha Noi
personal_info.summary: Web developer with about 3 years of experience developing web application using ASP.NET core, Entity Framework core, Reactjs, Vuejs. Expertise in requirements analysis, design, development, SEO enhancement, maintenance, and production support of business applications.

responsibilities: Designed and developed an internal data platform to empower C-level executives and business units with real-time analytics, dashboards, and data-driven insights for strategic decision-making.
Led the development of 'mecreator', an innovative content creation and management tool that enhances productivity and user engagement.
Optimized database queries and system performance, resulting in significant improvements to user experience, including faster load times and smoother interactions.
Integrated a third-party analytics tool.
Collaborated with product managers and designers to translate requirements into technical specifications, ensuring timely and successful project deliveries.
Implemented SEO best practices, leading to a 15% increase in organic traffic and improving search engine ranking positions.
Participated in brainstorming sessions and provided innovative solutions to technical challenges, leading to the adoption of new technologies and improved development workflows.

projects.name: Digital Web Store Front
projects.description: Digital web store font is a project type of SASS, provide store front for merchants to show their products with high ability customization.
responsibilities: Integrate with internal services.

Implement design and web functions.
Support teammates fix bug, pair coding.
